Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 169 

SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_1_SW 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Education 1: Speak a Language Other Than English at Home 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) education descriptor where 
patient speaks a language other than English at home. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_1_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
